text: Bitcoin is treading water near $59,250 while Ethereum shows modest strength at $1,596, suggesting a divergence where traders are rotating into altcoins despite extreme fear conditions. BTC dominance holding above 55% combined with only $82B in daily volume indicates thin conviction across the board—neither panic selling nor fresh capital entering the market. The Fear & Greed index at 11 and deteriorating over the past week signals capitulation sentiment, but the lack of volume behind the move suggests this may represent exhaustion rather than a genuine capitulation bottom.
